articles.title: Obama Presidential Center follows widely-mocked 'stolen land' acknowledgment with Native American dance show - Fox News
articles.description: Critics mocked the Obama Presidential Center's "land acknowledgement" as performative, while the center hosted Native American dance performances Saturday.

articles.title: Italy's Meloni unloads on Trump as fracture grows over G7 incident - Axios
